tool.name: MaiqMag Training
tool.command: mkdir sim_data && tar -xf $sim_results -C sim_data/ && export TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/torchinductor && pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app python -m maiqmag_ml train --root-dir sim_data --output $model > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2)
tool.help:
**MaiqMag Resolution Training**
This is a Galaxy tool to train the resolution model using Sunny/McVine digital twin simulations.
